title: Allogene Therapeutics Inc (ALLO) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Advances and Pipeline Updates
text: Allogene Q3 2025 Earnings Highlights. Financial: $207.1M cash (Sept). Quarterly loss $41.4M ($0.19/share). Runway into H2 2027. 2025 burn ~$150M. Operational: Advancing allogeneic platform for scalable, practical therapies. 50+ active trial sites US/Canada (Alpha 3). Plans to expand Australia/Korea. Enrollment on track. Clinical Milestones 2026: Alpha 3 interim data. ALLO-329 autoimmune PoC data. MRD conversion analysis. Challenges: Scientific/operational hurdles in autoimmune. MRD conversion uncertainty in Alpha 3. Competitive patient recruitment.
